title: Depop Flipper
tagline: Sell the jacket first, buy it after. A no-inventory Depop arbitrage desk in one index.html.

title: Depop Scout
tagline: Drives my own Chrome through Depop and flags anything priced way under its cohort's median.

title: Shopify Sim
tagline: A fake Shopify dashboard that pushes fake sale notifications to your very real phone.

title: ShopfiyCompleter
tagline: A full multi-store Shopify admin panel. Yes, the name is misspelled. No, I'm not fixing it.

title: UndergroundBrandd
tagline: The whole streetwear-brand operating manual: theme, ads, SMS, suppliers — ~60 playbooks deep.

title: Underground 805 Theme
tagline: The brand's front door: noise, scanlines, a blinking LIVE dot, EST. 805 / SANTA BARBARA.

title: Underground Brand Sheets
tagline: SMS list building at $0/month: storefront phone capture straight into a Google Sheet I own.

title: Larp Shopify
tagline: Maple & Stone Co. — a complete storefront for a store that does not exist. That's the point.

title: Snack Shack
tagline: A point-of-sale for an actual snack shack, running on a Google Sheet. Hosting cost: zero.

title: Viral Kit
tagline: The playbook for taking 50 private repos public without buying stars or doxxing myself.

title: Biz Finder
tagline: A local llama brainstorms business models; RDAP proves nobody owns the name. $0 in API bills.

title: Domain Grabber
tagline: AI brainstorms brandable domains; the registry itself says if they're free. No API keys.

title: Domain Master
tagline: Brute-forces the entire 3-character .com space against Verisign RDAP, hunting for drops.

title: Profile Namer
tagline: Infers people's real names from how they text you. Yes, it reads your iMessage history.

title: Web Projects
tagline: The junk drawer: client sites, two Shopify themes, and a Screen Time remover in one monorepo.

title: Handlehunt
tagline: Is @thatname free on GitHub, TikTok, Twitch and seven others? One command, no logins.
